name: @opencode-ai/clangd-mcp
description: Standalone MCP server bridging clangd LSP to OpenCode agents

scripts.build: /usr2/adagur/.bun/bin/bun build ./src/index.ts --outfile ./dist/index.js --target node --format esm && /usr2/adagur/.bun/bin/bun build ./src/bridge/index.ts --outfile ./dist/bridge.js --target node --format esm
scripts.validate:01880: env CLANGD_TCP_BRIDGE_PORT=35101 CHAIN_TEST_TIMEOUT_01880_MS=60000 CHAIN_RETRY_TIMEOUT_01880=1 CHAIN_RESOLVE_TIMEOUT_MS=20000 npx vitest run test/integration/chain-resolver-ground-truth.test.ts
scripts.validate:01968:shallow: env WLAN_WORKSPACE_ROOT=/local/mnt/workspace/code1/WLAN.CNG.1.0-01968.1-QCACNGSWPL_V1_V2_SILICON-1 CLANGD_TCP_BRIDGE_PORT=44403 CHAIN_SHALLOW_01968=1 CHAIN_RESOLVE_TIMEOUT_MS=7000 npx vitest run test/integration/chain-resolver-ground-truth.test.ts -t bpf-notify-handler
scripts.validate:01968:full-liveness: env WLAN_WORKSPACE_ROOT=/local/mnt/workspace/code1/WLAN.CNG.1.0-01968.1-QCACNGSWPL_V1_V2_SILICON-1 CLANGD_TCP_BRIDGE_PORT=44403 CHAIN_SINGLE_SOCKET_MODE=1 CHAIN_RESOLVE_TIMEOUT_MS=15000 CHAIN_LIVE_TIMEOUT_MS=3000 npx vitest run test/integration/chain-resolver-ground-truth.test.ts -t bpf-notify-handler
scripts.validate:matrix:conditional-go: npm run validate:unit && npm run typecheck && npm run validate:01880 && npm run validate:01968:shallow
